headline: Domino’s CEO sounds alarm as pizza orders take an unexpected turn
summary: Domino’s Pizza is seeing a slowdown tied to changes in consumer behavior that are pressuring sales. Despite launching generous deals to attract customers, the pizza chain recently posted weak sales growth, and its CEO is pointing to the drivers of the shift. In the first few months of this ...
